question_tagalog: Ano yung the best na natutunan mo from your past relationships?
question_english: What is the best thing you learned from your past relationships?
quote_tagalog: Ang nakaraan ay guro, hindi bilangguan.
quote_english: The past is a teacher, not a prison.

question_tagalog: May ex ka ba na nagturo sayo ng lesson in a hard way?
question_english: Do you have an ex who taught you a lesson the hard way?
quote_tagalog: Kahit masakit, may natutunan tayo.
quote_english: Even if it hurts, we learned something.

question_tagalog: Pano mo nalaman na totally moved on ka na sa nakaraan mo?
question_english: How did you know you totally moved on from your past?
quote_tagalog: Magaan na ang puso kapag naka-move on na.
quote_english: The heart is light when you've moved on.

question_tagalog: Ano yung red flag noon na akala mo green flag?
question_english: What was a red flag before that you thought was a green flag?
quote_tagalog: Minsan nagbubulag-bulagan dahil sa pag-ibig.
quote_english: Sometimes we turn a blind eye because of love.

question_tagalog: Paano nag-change yung standards mo dahil sa past experiences mo?
question_english: How did your standards change because of your past experiences?
quote_tagalog: Mas alam mo na ngayon ang deserve mo.
quote_english: You now know what you deserve.

question_tagalog: Ano yung hindi mo na uulitin gawin sa relationship natin ngayon?
question_english: What won't you repeat doing in our relationship now?
quote_tagalog: Mag-grow tayo outside sa mga mali natin noon.
quote_english: Let's grow outside our past mistakes.

question_tagalog: May regret ka ba kung pano natapos yung huli mong relationship?
question_english: Do you have any regret on how your last relationship ended?
quote_tagalog: Ang nangyari ay nangyari na, focus on today.
quote_english: What happened has happened, focus on today.

question_tagalog: Ano yung pinaka-matagal bago mo na-let go emotionally?
question_english: What took you the longest to let go emotionally?
quote_tagalog: Time heals all wounds.
quote_english: Time heals all wounds.

question_tagalog: Naiisip mo pa rin ba sometimes yung closure na di mo nakuha?
question_english: Do you still think sometimes about the closure you didn't get?
quote_tagalog: Minsan ang walang closure, ay closure na din.
quote_english: Sometimes no closure is already closure.

question_tagalog: Ano yung difference ko sa mga naging past crushes or exes mo?
question_english: What's the difference between me and your past crushes or exes?
quote_tagalog: Ako na yung present at future mo.
quote_english: I am now your present and future.

question_tagalog: Nag-iba ba yung definition mo ng love dahil sa nakaraan?
question_english: Did your definition of love change because of the past?
quote_tagalog: Ang tunay na pag-ibig ay hindi nakakasakit.
quote_english: True love does not hurt.

question_tagalog: Anong habit galing sa past mo yung tinanggal mo na bago naging tayo?
question_english: What habit from your past did you remove before we got together?
quote_tagalog: Better version for a better relationship.
quote_english: Better version for a better relationship.

question_tagalog: May baggage ka ba from the past na binubuhat mo pa rin hanggang ngayon?
question_english: Do you have baggage from the past that you still carry now?
quote_tagalog: Tutulungan kitang bitawan yan.
quote_english: I will help you let that go.

question_tagalog: Sino yung unang tao na nasabihan mo dati nung brokenhearted ka?
question_english: Who was the first person you told before when you were brokenhearted?
quote_tagalog: Importante ang may kaibigang nakikinig.
quote_english: It's important to have a listening friend.

question_tagalog: Ano yung thing na ginawa ng ex mo na natuwa ka, pero mas bet mo ginagawa ko?
question_english: What thing did your ex do that you liked, but you prefer when I do it?
quote_tagalog: Ibahin natin ang kwento natin.
quote_english: Let's make our story different.

question_tagalog: Paano mo ide-describe yung growth mo from your first heartbreak?
question_english: How would you describe your growth from your first heartbreak?
quote_tagalog: Tingnan mo kung gaano ka na kalakas ngayon.
quote_english: Look at how strong you are now.

question_tagalog: Anong part ng healing process mo yung pinaka-mahirap?
question_english: Which part of your healing process was the hardest?
quote_tagalog: Ang pagtanggap ang unang hakbang.
quote_english: Acceptance is the first step.

question_tagalog: Naging friends ba kayo ng ex mo, at okay lang ba sayo yun?
question_english: Did you become friends with your ex, and are you okay with that?
quote_tagalog: Boundaries make things clear and safe.
quote_english: Boundaries make things clear and safe.

question_tagalog: Ano yung isang advice na ibibigay mo sa taong hindi maka-move on?
question_english: What is one advice you'd give to someone who can't move on?
quote_tagalog: Piliin mag-move forward, araw-araw.
quote_english: Choose to move forward, every day.

question_tagalog: Anong kanta ang theme song mo nung heartbroken ka pa?
question_english: What song was your theme song when you were still heartbroken?
quote_tagalog: Musika ang naging yakap nang wala akong makapitan.
quote_english: Music was the hug when I had nothing to hold.

question_tagalog: May tinago ka bang gifts or letters from your past?
question_english: Did you keep any gifts or letters from your past?
quote_tagalog: Ang nakaraan ay naging alaala na lang.
quote_english: The past has simply become a memory.

question_tagalog: Ano yung bagay na sinumpa mo sa sarili mong di mo na gagawin in love?
question_english: What thing did you swear to yourself you wouldn't do in love again?
quote_tagalog: Wag ibigay ang buong sarili na walang tinitira.
quote_english: Don't give your whole self leaving nothing behind.

question_tagalog: Kung magkikita kayo ng ex mo ngayon, anong gusto mong sabihin sa kanya?
question_english: If you meet your ex now, what would you want to tell them?
quote_tagalog: Salamat sa lessons, I'm happier now.
quote_english: Thanks for the lessons, I'm happier now.

question_tagalog: May nagawa ka bang 'crazy ex thing' dati?
question_english: Did you do a 'crazy ex thing' before?
quote_tagalog: Nagiging tanga tayong lahat minsan dahil sa love.
quote_english: We all become fools sometimes because of love.

question_tagalog: Ano yung trait ng naging partner mo dati na never na pwede sayo ngayon?
question_english: What trait of a former partner is now a never for you?
quote_tagalog: Non-negotiables keep the heart safe.
quote_english: Non-negotiables keep the heart safe.

question_tagalog: Pano mo sina-stop yung sarili mo na icompare ako sa nakaraan mo?
question_english: How do you stop yourself from comparing me to your past?
quote_tagalog: Iba ako, iba ang story nating dalawa.
quote_english: I am different, our story is different.

question_tagalog: Ano yung naging coping mechanism mo nung naghihiwalay kayo?
question_english: What was your coping mechanism during your breakups?
quote_tagalog: Lahat ng pain, nareresolve in time.
quote_english: All pain is resolved in time.

question_tagalog: Ano yung sign sayo na 'toxic' na pala yung dating relationship mo?
question_english: What was the sign to you that your former relationship was actually 'toxic'?
quote_tagalog: Walang lugar ang toxicity sa matinong pag-ibig.
quote_english: Toxicity has no place in sensible love.

question_tagalog: Naranasan mo na ba yung feeling na pinagpalit ka sa iba?
question_english: Have you ever experienced the feeling of being replaced by someone else?
quote_tagalog: Hindi mo kasalanan kung hindi nila nakita value mo.
quote_english: It's not your fault if they didn't see your value.

question_tagalog: Ano yung bagay na promise mo sa sarili mo after your major breakup?
question_english: What thing did you promise yourself after your major breakup?
quote_tagalog: Mahalin ang sarili ng sobra next time.
quote_english: Love yourself excessively next time.

question_tagalog: Sino yung tao na naging safe space mo nung nasaktan ka dati?
question_english: Who was the person that became your safe space when you got hurt before?
quote_tagalog: Gusto kitang maging safe space always.
quote_english: I want to be your safe space always.

question_tagalog: May fear ka ba ngayon in our relationship based from your past?
question_english: Do you have a fear now in our relationship based from your past?
quote_tagalog: Titiyakin kong hindi mangyayari ulit yung dating sakit.
quote_english: I'll ensure the old pain won't happen again.

question_tagalog: Ano yung red flag sa nakaraan na hinayaan mo lang nang matagal?
question_english: What red flag in the past did you just ignore for a long time?
quote_tagalog: Ngayon, mas alam na natin yung mas makakabuti.
quote_english: Now, we know better what is good.

question_tagalog: Napatawad mo na ba talaga yung mga nakasakit sayo dati?
question_english: Have you really forgiven those who hurt you before?
quote_tagalog: Ang pagpapatawad ay para sa own peace of mind.
quote_english: Forgiveness is for your own peace of mind.

question_tagalog: May memories ba dun sa nakaraan mo na smile ka nalang out of cringeyness?
question_english: Are there memories in your past where you just smile out of cringeyness?
quote_tagalog: Nakakatawa nalang din minsan pag iniisip.
quote_english: It's just funny sometimes when you think about it.

question_tagalog: Ano yung inakala mong 'ikakamatay' mo sa sakit, pero naka-survive ka?
question_english: What did you think would 'kill' you in pain, but you survived?
quote_tagalog: Buhay ka pa at malakas.
quote_english: You are still alive and strong.

question_tagalog: May part ba ng personality mo na nanigas or naging cold dahil sa past?
question_english: Did a part of your personality turn rigid or cold because of the past?
quote_tagalog: Sana matunaw natin ulit yelo sa puso mo.
quote_english: I hope we can melt the ice in your heart again.

question_tagalog: Ano yung lie na naniwala ka dating sinasabi from your past love?
question_english: What lie did you believe before that was said from your past love?
quote_tagalog: Pure honesty lang ibibigay ko sayo.
quote_english: I will only give you pure honesty.

question_tagalog: May place ba that holds a heavy past memory for you na iniiwasan mo?
question_english: Is there a place that holds a heavy past memory for you that you avoid?
quote_tagalog: Gawa tayo ng bagong memories doon.
quote_english: Let's make new memories there.

question_tagalog: Kung yung current self mo yung kakausap sa past self mo during a breakup, anong sasabihin mo?
question_english: If your current self would talk to your past self during a breakup, what would you say?
quote_tagalog: Yakapin sana kita noon para gumaan pakiramdam mo.
quote_english: Would have hugged you back then to make you feel better.

question_tagalog: Sa paanong paraan ka naging mas self-aware after the breakups?
question_english: In what way did you become more self-aware after the breakups?
quote_tagalog: Ang maturity ay nakukuha din sa sakit.
quote_english: Maturity is also gained from pain.

question_tagalog: Na-experience mo na bang umiyak habang nakasakay sa commute because of a breakup?
question_english: Have you experienced crying while taking public commute because of a breakup?
quote_tagalog: Mainit na yakap pagkauwi ang sasalubong sayo.
quote_english: A warm hug at home will welcome you.

question_tagalog: Ano yung pinaka-random na bagay na nag-trigger ng sad past memory mo recently?
question_english: What is the most random thing that triggered your sad past memory recently?
quote_tagalog: Ligtas ka na ngayon, kasama mo na ako.
quote_english: You are safe now, you are with me.

question_tagalog: Pano mo in-unlearn yung mga toxic traits ng past rel mo nung naging tayo?
question_english: How did you unlearn the toxic traits of your past rel when we became a couple?
quote_tagalog: Unti-unti tayong nasasanay sa healthy love.
quote_english: We slowly get used to healthy love.

question_tagalog: May natutunan ka ba about your communication style from your ex?
question_english: Did you learn anything about your communication style from your ex?
quote_tagalog: Gawin nating maayos ang pag-uusap natin.
quote_english: Let's make our conversations clear.

question_tagalog: Ano yung feeling na naging free ka ulit after a draining relationship?
question_english: What was the feeling of being free again after a draining relationship?
quote_tagalog: Ang sarap huminga pag malaya na.
quote_english: It feels good to breathe when you're free.

question_tagalog: Nawala ba yung self-esteem mo in the past, at pano mo nabuo ulit?
question_english: Did you lose your self-esteem in the past, and how did you build it again?
quote_tagalog: Proud ako kung gano mo binangon sarili mo.
quote_english: I'm proud of how you lifted yourself up.

question_tagalog: May part ba yung family or friends mo na ayaw dun sa past ng palihim?
question_english: Did your family or friends secretly dislike your past partner?
quote_tagalog: I hope you surround yourself with good people.
quote_english: I hope you surround yourself with good people.

question_tagalog: Anong standard yung binaba mo sa past na never mo nang ibababa sakin?
question_english: What standard did you lower in the past that you will never lower with me?
quote_tagalog: Wag na wag mag compromise ng inner peace.
quote_english: Never compromise inner peace.

question_tagalog: Are you thankful na hindi nag-work out yung previous relationships mo?
question_english: Are you thankful that your previous relationships didn't work out?
quote_tagalog: Kundi dahil doon, hindi tayo magtatagpo ngayon.
quote_english: If not for that, we wouldn't have met now.

question_tagalog: Naiisip mo pa ba yung mga what-ifs sa mga in-encouter mong past lovers?
question_english: Do you still think of what-ifs with the past lovers you encountered?
quote_tagalog: Tapos na yun, mag-focus sa tinatahak...
quote_english: That's over, focus on the path...

question_tagalog: Ano yung pinaka-lesson ng first love mo sayo vs sa last ex mo?
question_english: What was the biggest lesson of your first love versus your last ex?
quote_tagalog: Iba't ibang phase, iba't ibang lesson.
quote_english: Different phases, different lessons.

question_tagalog: Nagbago ba yung dream wedding mo or life plan dahil nagbago partner mo?
question_english: Did your dream wedding or life plan change because your partner changed?
quote_tagalog: Sana kasali nako sa lahat ng future plans mo.
quote_english: I hope I'm included in all your future plans.

question_tagalog: Kung susulatan mo ng no-send letter yung ex mo noon, ano ang first sentence?
question_english: If you were to write a no-send letter to your ex then, what would be the first sentence?
quote_tagalog: Palayain mo na ang mabibigat sa puso.
quote_english: Release the heaviness in your heart.

question_tagalog: May insecurities ba na iniwan ang nakaraan mo sayo?
question_english: Are there insecurities that your past left to you?
quote_tagalog: Ipaparamdam ko sayo na you are completely enough.
quote_english: I will make you feel that you are completely enough.

question_tagalog: Pano mo in-invest time and energy mo sa sarili mo nung single ka after a breakup?
question_english: How did you invest time and energy in yourself when single after a breakup?
quote_tagalog: Ang sarili ang priority pag naghilom na.
quote_english: Oneself is the priority when healing.

question_tagalog: Naging bitter ka ba noon saglit bago ka naging better?
question_english: Did you become bitter for a while before you became better?
quote_tagalog: Natural ang maging madilim minsan, part yan ng pag-usad.
quote_english: It's natural to be dark sometimes, it's part of moving on.

question_tagalog: Pano ko mahe-help na hindi mo mafeel yung trauma ng past mo satin?
question_english: How can I help you not to feel the trauma of your past with us?
quote_tagalog: Papatunayan ko lagi na iba ang pag-ibig ko.
quote_english: I will always prove that my love is different.

question_tagalog: Sino yung unang napansin mo after mong maka-move on sa past relationship mo?
question_english: Who is the first person you noticed after moving on from your past relationship?
quote_tagalog: Yung saya ay babalik din nang kusa.
quote_english: Happiness will return on its own.

question_tagalog: Are you finally ready closing that chapter of your past and keeping our book explicitly open?
question_english: Are you finally ready closing that chapter of your past and keeping our book open?
quote_tagalog: Handang-handa na akong isulat ang bago nating kwento.
quote_english: I am very ready to write our new story.
